info.name: service 02/06/2026
info.description: Subscription → Provider Setup → Services → Bookings → Stats. Full scenario for service providers and end users.

exec: if (r.token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('token', r.token); console.log('✅ Token saved'); }

exec: const list = Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : (r.data && r.data.data ? r.data.data : []);
console.log('✅ Location ID saved:', list[0].id, '|', list[0].location_name);
console.log('⚠️ No locations found — run the terminal command to add one');
const total = r.data.available_slots.reduce((acc, d) => acc + d.time_slots.length, 0);
console.log('📅 Available slots this week:', total);
if (total === 0) console.log('⚠️ No availability — all slots booked');
console.log('✅ Session ID:', r.data.booking.id, '| Price:', r.data.total_price, 'SAR');
